purpose: Public-response-shape gate for the additive `_algovault` conversion CTA block on the 3 hot public proof endpoints. This is the REUSABLE artifact: any future public JSON endpoint adopts the block via `res.json({ ...body, _algovault: buildPublicCtaBlock() })` and is covered by the `_algovault` contract below. Supersedes — for the `_algovault` key only — the per-endpoint snapshots api-performance-public-shape-snapshot-2026-06-22.json and api-erc-8004-reputation-shape-snapshot-2026-05-16.json (both PRESERVED unmutated for historical lineage; the 2026-05-16 file is explicitly never-mutate). Existing (non-`_algovault`) fields are BYTE-UNCHANGED by this wave.
source: src/lib/public-cta.ts::buildPublicCtaBlock() (single-derivation) + src/index.ts handlers + src/lib/erc8004-reputation.ts builder. Verified live pre/post deploy via the drift_check_command below.

approved_copy_verbatim.brand: The Brain Layer for AI Trading Agents
approved_copy_verbatim.note: Building an agent? Get a free API key — higher limits, all tools, x402 pay-per-call.

cta_block.cache_note: Static values → no per-request variance → cache-safe under the 45s origin-shield edge cache on all 3 paths.
cta_block.reusable_pattern: ADD (fresh block): res.json({ ...body, _algovault: buildPublicCtaBlock() }). EXTEND (endpoint already emits `_algovault` meta): _algovault: { ...existingMeta, ...buildPublicCtaBlock() }.

/api/performance-public.change_class: ADDITIVE — new top-level `_algovault` key. All 17 prior top-level keys byte-unchanged.
consumers: Cloudflare edge cache (45s origin-shield; static CTA is cache-safe)
/opt/algovault-monitoring/website-drift-canary.py (reads per-metric-class jq accessors — .totalCalls/.overall.pfeWinRate/etc — NOT a top-level key-set; `_algovault` is inert to it)

/api/merkle-batches.change_class: ADDITIVE — new top-level `_algovault` key. batches/contractAddress/chain byte-unchanged.

/api/erc-8004-reputation.change_class: EXTEND — endpoint already emitted `_algovault` {version, endpoint_version, freshness_seconds}; the 4 CTA sub-keys are APPENDED. The 3 prior meta sub-keys + all 13 sibling top-level keys byte-unchanged. Historical shape lock preserved in api-erc-8004-reputation-shape-snapshot-2026-05-16.json (never-mutate).
consumers: Cloudflare edge cache (5-min body TTL + 45s edge)
external ERC-8004-aware indexers (consume canonical shape; additive CTA is non-breaking)

data_integrity.law: The `_algovault` CTA carries brand + generic CTA + public URLs ONLY. Zero internal metrics.
data_integrity.grep_check: curl -s https://algovault.com/api/<endpoint> | jq -c '._algovault' | grep -icE 'outcome_return_pct|outcome_price|win.?rate|equit|phase.?e'  → MUST be 0 for all 3 endpoints.

drift_check_command: for p in performance-public merkle-batches erc-8004-reputation; do curl -s "https://algovault.com/api/$p" | jq -e '._algovault | (.brand=="The Brain Layer for AI Trading Agents" and .note=="Building an agent? Get a free API key — higher limits, all tools, x402 pay-per-call." and .get_started=="https://algovault.com/#pricing" and .docs=="https://algovault.com/docs.html")' >/dev/null && echo "$p CTA_OK" || echo "$p CTA_FAIL"; curl -s "https://algovault.com/api/$p" | jq -c '._algovault' | grep -iqE 'outcome_return_pct|outcome_price|win.?rate|equit|phase.?e' && echo "$p FORBIDDEN_LEAK" || echo "$p CLEAN"; done
unit_test: tests/unit/public-cta.test.ts (formatter copy + purity + Data-Integrity canary); tests/unit/erc8004-public-shape.test.ts (extended `_algovault` toEqual lock).
